title: Schdlr (Appointment Scheduling App)
description: A full-stack scheduling platform supporting businesses, staff, and clients. Features service management, conflict-checked bookings, auto-generated invoices, Stripe payments, and post-appointment feedback.

title: aliahhmad.com (Personal Portfolio)
description: A personal portfolio website showcasing projects, experience, and skills — designed and built from scratch with react and express to reflect a clean, modern developer identity.
